proven.claim: REACHABLE: changedFiles array can contain duplicates (race condition in git)
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2, P4
; LINE: 186
; REACHABLE: changedFiles array can contain duplicates (race condition in git)
(declare-const file_1 String)
(declare-const file_2 String)
(declare-const file_count Int)
(declare-const unique_count Int)
(assert (= file_1 "src/cli.ts"))
(assert (= file_2 "src/cli.ts"))
(assert (= file_count 2))
(assert (= unique_count 1))
; Loop logs file_1 then file_2 (same file twice)
(assert (= file_count unique_count))
(check-sat)
; sat → duplicate entries cause same file to be logged multiple times

violations.claim: REACHABLE: f can be absolute path if git returns absolute paths
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1, P2, P3
; LINE: 186
; REACHABLE: f can be absolute path if git returns absolute paths
(declare-const project_root String)
(declare-const changed_file String)
(declare-const relative_result String)
(assert (= project_root "/home/user/project"))
(assert (= changed_file "/home/user/project/src/cli.ts"))
(assert (= relative_result "/home/user/project/src/cli.ts"))
; relative() returns unchanged path if no common prefix removal
(assert (= relative_result changed_file))
(check-sat)
; sat → absolute paths pass through relative() unchanged
